member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ConfigurationFile.Parser.ParseFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a configuration object from the file.

member.name: P:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ConfigurationFile.UeiPinNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the list pins in which control sets could be applied.

member.name: P:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ConfigurationFile.TccTemperatureSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the TCCTempSet (name given to different control set configurations).

member.name: P:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TccTempSet.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the TccTemp set configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TccTempSet.ControlSetMapping
member.summary: Gets or sets the mapping between control set names and indexes assigned on the thermal controller.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.IThermalControlSetService.ApplyControlSet(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Changes the active control set for the corresponding pin.
member.param: pin in which control set will be applied.
index of the control set defined in the config file.
time before actually applying the ControlSet on the thermal controller.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.IThermalControlSetService.SetTemperatureSetName(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets the name of the temperatureSet to be used for ControlSet application.
member.param: name of the TempeSet previously defined in the json config file.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.IThermalControlSetService.GetControlSetIndex(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns if the control set exists in the temperature set.
member.param: name of the control set defined in the config file.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: true if the control set exists in the temperature set.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.IThermalControlSetService.IsUeiPinAllowed(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets if the uei pin was defined in te control set configuration file.
member.param: the name of the uei pin.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ThermalControlSetService.LoadConfigurationFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Main LoadConfigurationFile and Load method, for init.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalControlSetService.ThermalControlSetService.HasUei
member.summary: This method port from thermal service while waiting for thermal service to migration into Prime.Services branch.
